response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web engineer with deep TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang experience, but fails the hard requirements for this role: there is no evidence of native-level Japanese, no embedded LAN-switch or networking security background (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3), and no Linux kernel modification experience. C exposure is limited to a brief 2014–2015 stint at National Instruments on a desktop IDE, not embedded firmware.
strengths: Long, varied software-engineering career with full-lifecycle ownership
Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and low-latency systems work in DLang
Strong testing, TDD, and CI/CD discipline relevant to firmware quality
concerns: No indication of native-level Japanese proficiency (hard requirement)
No embedded networking, switch chip, or security-protocol experience (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP)
No Linux kernel investigation or source-modification experience; primary stack is web/cloud, not embedded C on UNIX

key_factors.factor: Insufficient C-on-UNIX and Linux kernel work
